bull_thesis: The EU-forced Delivery Hero (DHER) divestiture overhang is clearing on FAVORABLE terms, not as a fire sale. Prosus sold 4.5% to Uber at EUR 20.00 (Apr-26, ~22% premium to 1M VWAP, ~EUR 270m) and ~5% to Aspex at EUR 22.00 (May-26, ~EUR 335m) - a competitive bid book around the block. Uber then tabled a EUR 33/share indicative bid for all of DHER (~EUR 10bn EV, May 23 2026), turning Prosus's residual ~16.8% from a distressed line item into a strategically-sold asset, and the EU GRANTED a waiver extending the divestiture deadline to Oct 11 2026 (shares +10% on Jun 2). Prosus is even asking the EU to DROP the forced-sale remedy entirely so it can hold into an Uber bid. Underneath, Prosus is a deep-discount holdco (~35% NAV discount, ~80% Tencent) with >EUR 13bn gross cash running a self-funding ~10%/yr buyback at the discount - a mechanical, NAV-accretive bid that narrows the gap regardless of DHER. Bull = overhang removed + modest discount-narrowing re-rate toward EUR 46.21.
bear_thesis: The catalyst is DIFFUSE and SOFTENING, not a hard-dated clearing event. The overhang is being worked off in tranches rather than one re-rate; the only hard date (EU Oct 11 2026) is being made irrelevant by Prosus's own request to keep the stake, so there is no forcing-function pop. Uber's EUR 33 DHER bid is INDICATIVE (no SPA, BaFin/antitrust ahead) and could collapse, softening the residual stake - though DHER is only a minor NAV line. Critically, the REAL driver of the ~35% Prosus discount is Tencent/China, not DHER: Tencent Q1-26 revenue +9% YoY missed, and the China overhang keeps the discount sticky no matter how cleanly DHER resolves. Bear = the DHER catalyst delivers a small, gradual benefit while the dominant Tencent discount persists, leaving the stock near a deep-NAV-discount holdco floor of ~EUR 37.37.
sop_bull: Event-win value ~EUR 46.21. Derivation: Prosus NAV is ~80% Tencent (liquid, marked daily) + >EUR 13bn gross net cash + ecommerce portfolio + the DHER stake. Live ~EUR 38-39.5 embeds a ~35% NAV discount. Removing the DHER forced-seller overhang AND continued ~10%/yr discount-accretive buyback narrows the discount partway (well short of full NAV) => ~EUR 46.21, ~+18% to live. The DHER stake itself is being monetized at PREMIUMS (EUR 20-22 realized vs Stifel ~EUR 40 prob-weighted DHER target), adding NAV rather than subtracting it.
sop_bear: Verified downside floor ~EUR 37.37 (~5% below live). Derivation: even with NO incremental DHER benefit, Prosus is a mechanically-supported deep-discount holdco - ~80% Tencent (liquid), >EUR 13bn gross cash, and an active ~10%/yr buyback at a ~35% discount that bids the stock. The floor is a modest DHER-disappointment haircut on the current NAV-discount holdco, NOT a deal-break cliff. No going-concern, no dilution/ATM, no covenant wall, no CVR - net-cash balance sheet = the safest floor profile in the funnel. Tencent/China is the live downside variable, but Tencent is liquid and marked, bounding the loss.
sop_breakdown: Probability-weighted base case. Target EUR 46.21 (overhang-clearing + partial discount-narrowing + buyback accretion) vs floor EUR 37.37 (deep-discount holdco, minor DHER haircut). Weighting ~ 0.47 x 46.21 + 0.53 x 37.37 ~= EUR 41.5. The skew toward the floor reflects that the DHER catalyst is diffuse/soft and that the DOMINANT discount driver (Tencent/China) is unaffected by DHER resolution. NAV is ~80% Tencent (liquid) + net cash >EUR 13bn + ecommerce + DHER stake monetized at EUR 20-22 premiums; live EUR ~38-39.5 = ~35% NAV discount.
risk_reward: Upside-to-target +18% (EUR 39.30 -> 46.21) vs downside-to-floor -4.9% (EUR 39.30 -> 37.37) ~= 3.6:1 (card R:R 3.58). Asymmetry is genuine and the floor is real/mechanically-supported, but the upside is a gradual overhang-removal + buyback re-rate, not a hard-dated event-day pop.
catalyst_summary: EU-forced Delivery Hero divestiture overhang clearing at PREMIUMS (Uber EUR 20 / Aspex EUR 22 vs ~EUR 40 DHER target) into an indicative Uber EUR 33 DHER bid; EU deadline EXTENDED to Oct 11 2026 and Prosus asking to drop the remedy - real, favorable, but diffuse/undated, R:R ~3.6:1 to a deep-NAV-discount holdco floor.
dated_milestone: EU divestiture compliance deadline extended to Oct 11, 2026 (waiver granted ~Jun 2, 2026); Uber EUR 33/share indicative bid for Delivery Hero tabled May 23, 2026 (non-binding, BaFin/antitrust pending).
forcing_function: The Oct 11, 2026 EU divestiture deadline is the only hard date - but it is SOFTENING (extended, and Prosus has asked the EU to drop the requirement entirely so it can hold into an Uber bid). The cleaner forcing function is resolution of the Uber/DHER takeover (a binding offer or its collapse) plus the self-funding ~10%/yr buyback mechanically narrowing the discount.
consensus_delta: The street still frames Prosus's DHER stake as a FORCED, discounted seller against a regulatory clock - a liability pressing both DHER's price and Prosus NAV. The hidden thesis: Prosus has flipped that script, realizing 22%+ PREMIUMS (Uber EUR 20, Aspex EUR 22) and winning a deadline extension to Oct 11 2026 plus the option to KEEP the stake into an Uber EUR 33 bid - converting a must-sell discount line into a strategically-monetized, possibly bid-target asset. Where consensus is RIGHT (and the bull must respect): the ~35% Prosus discount is driven by Tencent/China deceleration (Tencent Q1-26 rev +9% YoY, missed), NOT by DHER - so clearing DHER removes an irritant, not the dominant discount driver. The expectations-arb edge is real but bounded: the market under-credits the favorable overhang-clearing + buyback accretion, but anyone betting on FULL discount-closure is offside on the China overhang.
valley_of_death: Limited near-term blow-up risk - this is a net-cash (>EUR 13bn gross) holdco with no maturity wall, no cash-burn hump, no dilution. The 3-9 month risks are PRICE not solvency: (1) Tencent/China drawdown drags ~80% of NAV and the stock with it (the dominant variable); (2) Uber's INDICATIVE EUR 33 DHER bid collapses or stalls in BaFin/antitrust, softening the residual stake's mark; (3) the diffuse catalyst means no single re-rate day - the spread can grind sideways while China sentiment dominates the tape. None of these breach the EUR 37.37 floor structurally; they cap the upside and test patience.
positioning_washout: No forced-seller dynamic in Prosus's OWN base - there is no dividend cut or pivot to flush yield/passive holders. If anything the mechanical flow is FAVORABLE: the ~10%/yr buyback at a ~35% discount is a standing mechanical BID that shrinks the float and accretes NAV/share every quarter. The only washout in the complex is on Delivery Hero (Prosus IS the seller there), and it is being absorbed at premiums by strategic buyers (Uber, Aspex) rather than dumped into the market - the opposite of a disorderly washout.
moderator_conclusion: PRX.AS is a REAL special situation with an EXCELLENT floor but a SOFT, DIFFUSE catalyst - which is exactly why it lands at verdict B / conviction 3, not the A/5 reserved for a hard-dated binding event inside a tight window. The forced-seller overhang the funnel flagged is genuinely clearing, and clearing FAVORABLY (Uber EUR 20 / Aspex EUR 22 premiums, an Uber EUR 33 DHER bid, an EU deadline pushed to Oct 11 2026, and Prosus pressing to drop the remedy). But the catalyst is being realized in tranches with no single re-rate trigger, the Oct-11 date is being deliberately defanged, and the DOMINANT driver of the ~35% Prosus discount is Tencent/China, which this catalyst does not touch. Against that, the floor is the best in the funnel: a net-cash, liquid-NAV (~80% Tencent), deep-discount holdco with a self-funding ~10%/yr buyback - so the R:R ~3.6:1 to EUR 37.37 is real and the downside is capital-preserving, not impairing. Net: STAGE/WATCH it (B), size on weakness or on a binding Uber/DHER development or a clean China-sentiment washout that resets the entry; the asymmetry rewards patience but does not demand an aggressive day-one strike. value_conviction 4 reflects the deep, mechanically-supported margin of safety to a verified, liquid floor (NOT a franchise moat) - well above the catalyst conviction precisely because the floor carries this name even if the event under-delivers.
interrogator_dossier: PRX.AS - Prosus NV (Delivery Hero divest) - Forced-seller / overhang-clearing special situation (Idiosyncratic). THE EVENT: The EU's Aug-2025 approval of Prosus's Just Eat Takeaway acquisition forced Prosus to cut its ~16-17% Delivery Hero (DHER) stake to 'single-digit' - a known forced-seller overhang on a regulatory clock that pressed DHER and sat as a discounted must-sell line in Prosus NAV. 2026 transformed it: Apr-26 Prosus sold 4.5% to Uber at EUR 20.00 (~22% premium to 1M VWAP, ~EUR 270m); May-26 sold ~5% to Aspex at EUR 22.00 (~EUR 335m) - a competitive premium bid book, not a fire sale; May 23 2026 Delivery Hero confirmed Uber's INDICATIVE EUR 33/share bid (~EUR 10bn EV), Uber direct+optioned interest ~25%; Jun 2 2026 the EU GRANTED a waiver EXTENDING the divestiture deadline to Oct 11 2026 (PRX +10%), and Prosus asked the EU to DROP the remedy entirely to hold into an Uber bid. Stifel carries ~EUR 40 prob-weighted DHER target. NET: the catalyst is real and live but its CHARACTER flipped from forced-discount-seller-on-a-hard-August-clock to premium-seller / potential-bid-target-shareholder with a relaxed Oct-11 clock and an option to keep the asset. CREDIBILITY: Uber HIGH on intent (real cash deployed, EUR 33 tabled) but bid is INDICATIVE (no SPA; BaFin/antitrust ahead). Prosus mgmt HIGH (extracted premiums, won extension, NAV-accretive ~10%/yr buyback, >$42bn returned through 9/2025 at the discount). THE FLOOR (the crux): not a thin single-binary - the DHER stake is a small NAV fraction; the floor is the holdco itself. Live ~EUR 38.2-39.5 (EUR 38.22 Jun 20; card live EUR 39.30). NAV ~80% Tencent (liquid, marked daily) + >EUR 13bn gross cash + self-funding ~10%/yr buyback at a ~35% discount. Even with ZERO incremental DHER benefit the share is a mechanically-supported deep-NAV-discount holdco; card floor EUR 37.37 (~5% below live) is conservative - a modest DHER-disappointment haircut, NOT a deal-break cliff. Target EUR 46.21 (~+18%, R:R ~3.58) is a partial discount-narrowing + overhang-removal re-rate, well short of the full ~35% gap. RED FLAGS: catalyst DIFFUSE (realized in tranches, no single re-rate day); Oct-11 deadline being defanged by Prosus's request to keep the stake; DHER bid INDICATIVE; the REAL discount driver is Tencent/China (Q1-26 rev +9% YoY, missed), which DHER-clearing does not touch. MITIGANTS: premiums realized, clock relaxed, hold-optionality, mechanical buyback bid. NO going-concern / dilution / ATM / covenant / CVR - net-cash, safest floor in the funnel. VERDICT: real, live, but PENDING-yet-SOFT/serially-extended catalyst with an excellent floor - earns a solid stage/watch, not the conviction-5 of a hard-dated binding event. Moat/secular N/A (holdco NAV is Tencent-driven; manageable, not terminal). CREDIBILITY_SCORE: 3 | TRAJECTORY: STABLE | MOAT: NONE | MOAT_TREND: STABLE | SECULAR_THREAT: manageable
